raw_consumer_statement:
I placed an order for a phone through Best Buy on XX/XX/year>. According to tracking information ( XXXX tracking # XXXX ), XXXX marked the package as delivered, but it was mistakenly delivered to the wrong address. I contacted XXXX immediately, and they informed me they would speak to the driver and follow up with me the next day. Later that evening, the package was dropped off at my correct addressbut the box was empty. 

I followed up with FedEx, but they stated that since the package was marked as delivered to a residential address, their responsibility ended there and advised me to contact Best Buy. When I contacted Best Buy, they confirmed that they had provided the correct shipping address to XXXX and advised me to file a claim. 

Both companies directed me to open claims, which I did. However, each claim was ultimately closed with no resolution, and I was told I would not receive a refund. XXXX continued to state that I needed to resolve the matter with Best Buy. 

Due to the lack of resolution, I filed a police report, but there have been no updates after several months. I am still without the product or a refund. 

Link for XXXX tracking : XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX & XXXX
